title: lupinus arbustus var. montanus
intro: Lupinus arbustus var. montanus, also known as mountain bush lupine, is a subspecies of the lupine plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of mountain bush lupine include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Mountain bush lupine can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
